page_text: Official DAAD digital futures scholarship page for 2026/27. International applicants from Sri Lanka may apply for digital technology funding, but the page does not explicitly say whether the award is for Bachelor's, Master's, or doctoral study.

rules.evidence_text: Official DAAD page lists Sri Lanka.

rules.requirement_text: Applicant may apply from Sri Lanka.
rules.evidence_text: Official DAAD page says applicants may apply from their home country.
Official DAAD page describes international applicant funding.
Official DAAD page includes digital technology and AI.

rules.requirement_text: Award covers at least 40 percent funding need.
rules.evidence_text: Official DAAD page lists full tuition support and monthly allowance.
Official DAAD page lists deadline 15 October 2026.
Official DAAD page says applicants use the DAAD portal.
